reference: Hi, I was diagnosed with carpal tunnel syndrome a couple of years ago, but yesterday I woke up with a severe burning sensation in the heel of my right hand. It has gotten worse today and hurts when I put any pressure on my right hand at all. I was just wondering if it is related to carpal tunnel syndrome, and if so, does this mean that it is getting worse and I need to consider having the operation, or could it be something else?
text: Hi, I was diagnosed with carpal tunnel syndrome a couple of years ago, but yesterday I woke up with a severe burning sensation in the heel of my right hand. It has gotten worse today and hurts when I put any pressure on my right hand at all. I was just wondering if it is related to carpal tunnel syndrome, and if so, does this mean that it is getting worse and I need to consider having the operation, or could it be something else?
